content.en:
After comprehending the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Technique, Ye Tian's strength had already increased to an extremely terrifying level, and that Void Golden Peng should no longer be his opponent.

Eleventh dimension.

The Land of the Sixth Realm of Inheritance.

Ye Tian came out of it, but he didn't see ~ the Void Jinpeng.

"It seems that the Void Jinpeng thought I was dead, and just left!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had wanted to find trouble with the Void Golden Peng, but now it seemed that he couldn't find it.

The eleventh dimension was endless, and it was unlikely that they would meet each other, unless he had been waiting here, but he didn't want to.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian's replica body has been looking for resource treasures in the eleventh dimension, and due to the great increase in strength, he can defeat the other party when encountering an ordinary sixth realm multi-dimensional life, so he is naturally not afraid of encountering danger.

Now, he is completely free from worrying about the death multidimensional catastrophe.

With his current strength, he is enough to protect the human race.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian obtained a large number of resources from many realms for the birth of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation and some resources from the Eleventh Dimension, and continuously transported these resources into the Ten-Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower.

Some resources he kept for himself, some for his relatives, and a few for other strong human beings, even if it was a few, for them, it was unimaginably majestic resources, and they could easily create a massive extradimensional realm.

Therefore, the Terran powerhouses in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower, even if they have no way to go out, they have been nesting in one place, but they have sufficient resources, and their strength is skyrocketing.

As a result, a large number of fourth realms were born, and even if it was the fifth realm, it would not be long before a few more would be born.

this day.

Ye Tian also realized the eleventh dimension's will mastery - the Eternal Sword and the Eternal Pagoda Technique, one for attack and the other for defense.

After comprehending these two eleventh dimensional will masters, Ye Tian's strength improved again.

And under the will of the eleventh dimension, no matter how many doppelgangers the enemy has, no matter how deep the hiding is, he will be wiped out one by one.

This is the power of the Eleventh Dimension's Will Peerlessness!

Although the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Sect can also kill the soul will, it is not the Eleventh Dimensional Will Peerless Technique, and it cannot cross the void of many dimensions like the Eleventh Dimensional Will Peerless Technique, and wipe out all the parts and bodies together.

The power of the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect lies in the terrifying attack, exerting a power that far surpasses the Supreme Peerless Sect.

this day.

In the eleventh dimension, Ye Tian discovered a multi-dimensional silver fir tree.

"It turned out to be a complete multi-dimensional silver fir tree!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, this is a good thing, before the Heavenly Dimensional Realm Lord had a complete multi-dimensional silver fir plant, but it was pitted by a woman, which led to his own fall, not to mention, the multi-dimensional silver fir was also snatched away, leaving only a small section of the multi-dimensional silver fir behind.

Now, he has found a multidimensional silver fir tree, and his luck is really good.

Even if his soul will was raised to the eleventh dimension, the multidimensional silver fir still had some use for him, which could refine his soul will.

However, near this multidimensional silver fir tree, there is a sixth realm multi-dimensional life, this multi-dimensional life is not strong, it is just an ordinary sixth realm multi-dimensional life.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian directly cast the Five Realms Extreme Peerless Technique-Sword Eleven.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying sword directly pierced through this sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and the sharp sword light strangled all its will.

That's when it happened.

The soul will of this sixth-realm multi-dimensional life instantly turned into many phantoms, escaping to the voids of many dimensions, and the speed was extremely fast, and ordinary sixth realms would not have time to stop it.

"If you want to escape, dream!"

"Eleventh Dimension Peerless Learning—Eternal Sword!"

Woohoo!!!

The Eternal Sword spans many dimensions, locking its many soul will clones.

In an instant, all of these soul will clones were killed, and none of them escaped.

At this point, this Sixth Realm multidimensional life fell and turned into a corpse.

"The sixth realm multi-dimensional life was killed by me!"

Ye Tian was full of emotion.

Once upon a time, when he saw the corpse of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, he couldn't even get close, and he would be directly assimilated by it, but now he could easily kill an ordinary sixth realm multi-dimensional life.

"The corpse of the sixth realm of multi-dimensional life, its value is very high, bring it back to the human race, let the fifth realm of the human race or a few fourth realms to comprehend the extradimensional rules on it. "

With a wave of his hand, Ye Tian took away the corpse of the Sixth Realm Multi-Dimensional Life, and took away the Multi-Dimensional Silver Fir again.

......

Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate.

Terran.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came back from the eleventh dimension, bringing back the corpse of the sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and placed it inside the ten-dimensional heavenly gate.

At this time.

The machine spirit of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Gate Tower was shocked.

"Master, have you picked up the corpse of this Sixth Realm multi-dimensional life form?" asked the Machine Spirit Xiaoguan in surprise.

"It was killed by me!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Kill !!!!"

Machine Spirit Xiaoguan felt that it was incredible, even if it was the former master of the beginning, the fifth realm was invincible, and when he encountered the multi-dimensional life of the sixth realm, even if it was the most ordinary sixth realm multi-dimensional life, he could only save his life!

However, Ye Tian can kill this sixth realm multi-dimensional life, and judging from the wound, it seems to be a one-trick kill.

How strong is the master's strength now!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian placed the corpse of this Sixth Realm multi-dimensional lifeform in one of the voids, and then directly erased the power of the multi-dimensional lifeform on the other party's body, so that he would assimilate the weak creatures.

Soon.

Ye Tian sent his relatives and a small number of Terran Terran Fourth Realm peak existences to let them enter here to comprehend the scales and flesh of the Sixth Realm's multi-dimensional life forms to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

Soon, they came, and they were shocked to see the huge and incomparably large Sixth Realm multidimensional life forms.

"Father, is this a multidimensional life in the sixth realm?"

Ye Xingchen asked.

He is already in the fifth realm, so he can naturally see that this is not a multi-dimensional life in the fifth realm, it must be the sixth realm.

"Yes, in the future, you can enter here at any time to comprehend the extradimensional rules!" Ye Tian said.

Suddenly, everyone was excited, and they all chose a position to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

Ye Tian left here, he was going to kill a few more Sixth Realm multidimensional life forms, which was a good thing for cultivating the human race.

At the same time, he is also cultivating the Ten Pivot Gold Plate, striving to promote it to the third tribulation or even the fourth tribulation level as soon as possible.
